name: RSI10 Pullback Reversion V1
description: Larry Connors inspired pullback strategy: trade long only in a long-term uptrend when RSI10 closes below 30, then exit when RSI10 recovers above 40 or after 10 trading sessions.

source.title: RSI10 pullback strategy transcript shared by user
source.credit: Larry Connors concept as described in the training video

notes: Original video describes S&P 500 above 200DMA, RSI10 below 30, next-open entry, exit on RSI10 above 40 or after 10 trading days.
This implementation adapts the long-term uptrend filter to individual stocks using close above SMA200 because the app scans NSE watchlist stocks.
